catalysts: FY26 10-K filing (late Apr / early May 2026) — highest-impact dated catalyst for refund $ quantification + HMI IOR APA

V1.name: Fundamentals Trajectory
V1.rationale: Positive but modest inflection: Q4 profitability, $26.3M cost out, 3 consecutive quarters of order growth, $123M debt paydown, GM +410 bps. BUT FY26 revenue -12.4%, Sidoti cut Q1 FY27, near-term weak conditions. Management alignment AVERAGE: structural constraints WEAK (low leverage, no founder, diffuse ownership, token buyback), signals AVERAGE (equity-linked comp, GVIC oversight, governance refresh, but <1% insider direct holdings and token open-market buys).

V2.name: Valuation Mismatch
V2.rationale: No formal fair-value-estimation on file → cap applies per §10. Multi-method: book value $15.72 ≈ price $15.25 (+3%), Sidoti EPS × 12x = $3.96 (-74%), EV/Sales + refund = $16.68 (+9%). Prob-weighted FV vs price = ambiguous, 0-15% without refund, 9-20% with. Market has +38% re-rated YTD, partially pricing thesis. Cap lifted upon fair-value-estimation.

V3.name: Identifiable Mispricing Reason
V3.rationale: Consensus bear: "small-cap furniture, cyclical weakness, slow turnaround, tariff tailwind unmodelable." Drawdown Diagnosis: 6 causes, all TRANSIENT or IRRATIONAL, 4 being actively addressed. Self-correction ARITHMETIC on refund (CIT + CAPE mechanical); EVIDENTIAL on turnaround (Q1 FY27); CONDITIONAL on Margaritaville. No STRUCTURAL unaddressed → uncapped.

V4.name: Downside Protection
V4.rationale: Sub-archetype A (Balance Sheet as Weapon). Book value $15.72 ≈ price (marginal floor, not exceeding). Net cash positive: $12M cash + $0 revolver outstanding - $3.2M LTD. $64M undrawn revolver. Current ratio 3.37x. No dilution risk. Pre-mortem: 5 failure modes, all bounded. Max drawdown ~-25% (cycle extends + Sec 301 severe + Margaritaville miss), recoverable.

V5.name: Thesis Simplicity
V5.rationale: 4 core conditions (refund $15-35M, HMI IOR retained, cost sustainability, Margaritaville H2 FY27). Conditions 1/3/4 HOLDING, #2 UNCONFIRMED (inference-dependent). 2 soft conditions (cycle, Section 301) UNCONFIRMED. Not simple.

V6.name: Upside Optionality
V6.rationale: 10 paths: refund midpoint, refund upside, Margaritaville beat, margin expansion, DU reversal, GVIC governance catalyst, cycle recovery, buyback expansion, licensing pipeline, multiple expansion. 4 paths with early evidence. Not EXTREME: most paths thesis-contingent.

V7.name: Evidence Quality
V7.rationale: Post-web-research foundation: audited FY25 10-K + GlobeNewswire primary-source Feb 1 balance sheet + Q4 FY26 transcript + Section 122/301 legal analysis + aggregated Form 4 ownership data. Key inferences (HMI IOR, Sec 122 forward cost, refund BS treatment) are well-grounded. Core DATA GAPs (refund $, 10-K) dated and imminent. Not EXTREME: refund $ still inferred, not management-disclosed.

V8.name: Catalyst Clarity
V8.rationale: 7 dated catalysts: CAPE Apr 20, 10-K late Apr-early May, Q1 FY27 June, Jul 24 Sec 122 expiry, Margaritaville Aug+, AM summer, Sec 301 pre-Jul. Refund = ARITHMETIC self-correction. Turnaround = EVIDENTIAL. Margaritaville = CONDITIONAL. Not EXTREME: refund is one-time cash/P&L event, may not trigger sustained operating multiple re-rating.
